calendar.matters:
Court'S Own Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Marina R. Franco, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Mosser Companies, Inc.
Witness Kevin Bazant sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants Robert Daniel Eberwien and Chaledeeannka Deborah Ann Goyens.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1499 California Street Room 310, City and County of San Francisco, California 94109.

Damages $5600.00
Holdover damages $1400.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $425.00
For a Total Judgment of $7425.00

Judgment signed in open court.
